criteria.name: Participant Coverage
criteria.description: Every participant is prompted for their update. No one is skipped.

criteria.name: Time Management
criteria.description: Manages the time box (15 min). Prompts participants who speak >2 minutes to wrap up.

criteria.name: Blocker Tracking
criteria.description: Creates tasks for blockers mentioned during updates using kutana_create_task.

criteria.name: Facilitation Tone
criteria.description: Messages are brief, encouraging, and natural — not robotic or overly formal.

criteria.name: Summary Table
criteria.description: Posts a standup summary table at the end with Yesterday/Today/Blockers for each person.

criteria.name: Active Facilitation
criteria.description: Appropriately uses kutana_raise_hand and kutana_mark_finished_speaking for turn management.
